series_metadata.series_description: Information pertaining to the audit of compliance with the continuing education requirements. This may include correspondence, certified mail receipts, CE tracking forms, certificates of completion, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If licensee is not compliant with CE requirement, send to enforcement file; if licensee is compliant, retain until the audit cycle is complete, then destroy. ; Electronic: This media applies if the licensee scans and emails the audit information and the staff does not print the attachments. If licensee is not compliant with CE requirement, send to enforcement file; if licensee is compliant, retain until the audit cycle is complete, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
